changes: First stable release 🎉
SignalPad now ships as a proper Windows app with a setup installer
Desktop (Big View) mode — a large, resizable word-processor layout with a notes sidebar
Four page styles for Big View (Floating Sheet, Carved Well, Paper Stack, Drafting Frame) with configurable page color and width
Full stability pass — passcode locks, tab auto-save, checklists, deletes, paste, and window sizing all hardened in the 0.1.5 cycle
Fixed: password-type locks could never be unlocked — app and per-note locks now remember their type, and the unlock screen has a PIN/password switch
Fixed: unsaved changes were lost when closing a tab with the ✕ button
Fixed: checklist checkbox states are now saved with the note
Fixed: pressing Enter in a checklist reliably continues it; Enter on an empty item exits the list
Fixed: deleting notes from the list and editor did nothing
Fixed: the font size picker deselected your highlighted text
Fixed: Ctrl+Shift+N created two notes per press
Fixed: the window now actually resizes between list and editor views
Fixed: right-click Paste now works, including images
Fixed: burn-after-reading now triggers when a note's tab is closed, not just the back button
Fixed: the Patch Notes button in Help crashed the app
New: Desktop (Big View) mode — monitor button in the title bar opens a large, resizable layout with a notes sidebar and page-style editor
New: Big View page styles — Floating Sheet, Carved Well, Paper Stack, or Drafting Frame, with light / dark / match-theme page color (Settings → Appearance)
New: Copy Image in the editor right-click menu
PINs can now be 4–6 digits (new OK button on the pad)
Broken [[wiki links]] are now shown in red
Hardened file access and added a content security policy
App icon and logo added
Spellcheck suggestions in the right-click menu, with common-typo corrections
Tab support — open multiple notes simultaneously with a tab bar; close tabs to return to list
Table insertion — toolbar button inserts a styled 3-column table
Paragraph focus mode — dims all blocks except the one the cursor is in
Research notes panel — collapsible scratch pad per note, persisted separately from content
Version timeline — snapshot panel now has a Timeline tab showing all snapshots as a scrubbable dot rail
Word export — Save To… dialog now includes .docx option (headings, bold/italic/lists/tables preserved)
Word import — Import dialog now accepts .docx files, converted to HTML via mammoth
Update changelog.json to include changes for version 0.1.1
Update version to 0.1.1 and implement changelog management
Add spellcheck functionality to SignalPad
Add initial project structure for SignalPad app
